- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: fix: align PRACTICE EVENT payloads with GAS canonical labels (Oracle + Capoeira)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/oracle/pull/62
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/34
  
  Details:
  Traced and fixed two PRACTICE EVENT field mismatches against the GAS practice_event_processing.js parser. Oracle was sending raw reading fields (hexagrams, advisory_summary) instead of canonical labels. Capoeira was missing Practitioner Public Key and had session fields at top level instead of inside Payload JSON. Both now use: Program, Practice Type, Practitioner Public Key, Captured At, Source URL, Payload JSON.
